actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A six-tonne memorial has been unveiled at Beachy Head in East Sussex, dedicated to 55,573 airmen who lost their lives in Bomber Command.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died after a crash on the M40 in Warwickshire.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Cardiff Blues have appointed Matt Sherratt as their new backs coach.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A dog has survived after swallowing a toy arrow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been charged with murder after a man was found dead in a flat in Bournemouth.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A yellow weather warning has been issued for fog across Wales.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The warning covers Denbighshire, Flintshire, Wrexham, Powys, Blaenau Gwent, Caerphilly, Monmouthshire, Torfaen, Cardiff, Newport and Vale of Glamorgan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A teenager who was filmed being punched and kicked by a group of youths in October 2014 in Cardiff, will not be prosecuted.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Det Insp Lloyd Williams said: "As a result of our inquiries, our investigation has concluded and no further police action will be taken."

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A boat carrying 200 migrants has capsized off the coast of Libya.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The rescue comes exactly three years after 366 migrants died when an overcrowded boat sank off the Italian coast

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Republic of Ireland have qualified for the quarter-finals of Euro 2016.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Robbie Brady scored a late header to give his country a 1-0 victory over Italy. The Republic of Ireland will play the hosts France next - on Sunday afternoon. England will play Iceland on Monday, after Iceland qualified thanks to a dramatic late winner over Austria.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Northampton Town beat Oxford United 1-0 at the Kassam Stadium.
